subcodes.first_line: O son of Rustam! In this day, valor and bravery—boldness, audacity, and wisdom—consist in trustworthiness, trustworthiness; in piety, piety; in sincerity, sincerity; and in steadfastness, steadfastness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پور رستم امروز شجاعت و مردانگی جرئت و جسارت و فرزانگی امانت است امانت
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
